## Summary

- What does this change do?
- Why is it needed?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `npm run tauri build` (if packaging or native bundle assets changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I kept the change focused and avoided unrelated refactors
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I added screenshots or recordings for UI changes when useful
